title: Classification of Data Structures
description: A hierarchical tree diagram showing the classification of data structures into primitive and non-primitive categories, with their subcategories and common examples.
relationships: Primitive Data Structures are the fundamental building blocks
Non-Primitive Data Structures are built from Primitive types
Linear Data Structures are a subcategory of Non-Primitive where elements form a sequence
Non-Linear Data Structures are a subcategory of Non-Primitive where elements do not form a sequence
